business.tagline: Auto electrical problems solved right the first time

hero.headline: When three shops can't fix it, *Jason can*
hero.subheadline: 4.6 stars from 59 customers who know the difference between guessing and knowing

trust_badges.text: Won't give up on your problem

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every wire, fuse, and connection
services_section.subheading: When other shops throw in the towel, we're just getting started

services.title: Electrical System Diagnosis
services.description: We find the real problem, not just swap parts hoping something works. Complete system testing with professional equipment.

services.title: Starter & Alternator Repair
services.description: Dead battery? Won't crank? We test, rebuild, or replace starters and alternators to get you back on the road.

services.title: Wiring Harness Issues
services.description: Shorts, grounds, and mystery electrical gremlins. We trace every wire until we find what's causing your headaches.

services.title: Fuse & Relay Problems
services.description: Something keeps blowing fuses? We'll find why instead of just replacing them over and over.

about.heading: Jason doesn't quit on tough problems
about.body: Red Bank Auto Electric has built a reputation in Chattanooga for solving the electrical problems other shops can't figure out. We're the place mechanics send their own families when they're stumped. Jason takes on the basket cases, the mystery issues, and the problems that have been to three other shops. If it's got wires, we can fix it.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What customers say about Jason's work

reviews.name: George B.
reviews.text: Jason is an excellent mechanic. He fixed my basket case Cherokee when nobody else could get it running right.

reviews.name: Heather G.
reviews.text: Visiting from Chicago with electrical issues. They checked everything thoroughly, replaced a fuse, and gave honest advice about our battery.

reviews.name: Ruth K.
reviews.text: Three other shops couldn't fix my van. Jason refused to give up and proved to be both honest and capable. Jump on it if you can get him.

reviews.name: JaNiya C.
reviews.text: Customer service was above and beyond. Even though my problem couldn't be fixed immediately, Jason educated me and I left with confidence.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Chattanooga and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Auto electrical repair throughout the Tennessee Valley

cta.heading: Ready to solve your electrical problem?
cta.body: Stop guessing and get a real diagnosis from someone who won't quit until it's fixed right.
